posts.title: Startup Citizenship
posts.summary: Startup Citizenship—Enterprise & Common Good: New business creation happens within society and the startup interacts with all stakeholders, whether intentionally or unintentionally. Traditionally a startup business plan does not use words like the common good, but if the entrepreneur ignores the nature of the ways it interacts with people, the entrepreneur will adversely impact the […] The post Startup Citizenship appeared first on Venture Founders .
posts.author: Will Keyser
